criteria.name: Notebook loads real processed data
criteria.evidence: Code Cell 3 loads station_hourly.csv and station_daily.csv from data/processed/ for all PCA stations plus Stanhope reference. Prints row counts and column names confirming real data.

criteria.name: EDA section with map/table, temporal coverage, missingness heatmap
criteria.evidence: Code Cell 5 is a placeholder: 'will be expanded in subsequent loops.' No station coverage map, no temporal coverage summary, no missingness heatmap exists in the notebook.

criteria.name: PCA section with scree plot, loadings table, biplot
criteria.evidence: No PCA code or output in the notebook. The redundancy module is imported but never called. No scree plot, loadings table, or biplot.

criteria.name: Clustering with dendrogram or cluster assignment table
criteria.evidence: No clustering code or output. No dendrogram, no cluster assignment table, no intra/inter-cluster distance comparison.

criteria.name: Redundancy section answers which stations are redundant
criteria.evidence: Only a markdown heading exists. No actual analysis combining PCA + clustering + benchmarking to answer the redundancy question.

criteria.name: FWI time series for at least 2 stations
criteria.evidence: FWI module is imported but never called. No time series plots of FFMC, DMC, DC, ISI, BUI, or FWI for any station.

criteria.name: Uncertainty with confidence intervals
criteria.evidence: Uncertainty module is imported but never called. No confidence intervals or risk probabilities for station removal recommendations.

criteria.name: All cells execute top-to-bottom without errors
criteria.evidence: pytest test_analysis_notebook.py passes. All 4 code cells execute without error.

criteria.name: Conclusion cell with key findings and recommendations
criteria.evidence: MD Cell 4 says 'Key findings and recommendations will be documented here as the analysis progresses' — content is entirely empty.

summary: Phase 10 is in very early stages. Only AC-ANA-1 (data loading) and AC-ANA-8 (execution) pass. The notebook is essentially a skeleton with imports and a data loader. Seven of nine acceptance criteria fail: EDA is a placeholder, no PCA/clustering/FWI/uncertainty analysis exists, and the conclusion is empty. The test suite itself is incomplete — test_analysis_notebook.py only tests AC-ANA-1 and AC-ANA-8, leaving AC-ANA-2 through AC-ANA-7 and AC-ANA-9 completely untested. Ralph needs to implement the actual analysis sections and expand test coverage.
